scripts.build: npm run validate:partsbin && npm run cleanup && npm run compile
scripts.package: npm run build && pkg . --targets node18-win-x64 --out-path bin && rcedit bin/anarchi-visual-engine.exe --set-icon src/assets/icon.ico
scripts.sign: signtool sign /fd SHA256 /f "%CERT_PATH%" /p "%CERT_PASSWORD%" /tr https://timestamp.digicert.com /td SHA256 bin/anarchi-visual-engine.exe
scripts.release: npm run package && npm run sign && node -e "const fs=require('fs'), crypto=require('crypto'); const id=crypto.randomBytes(8).toString('hex'); const d='./releases/v'+process.env.npm_package_version+'-'+id; if(!fs.existsSync(d))fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('./bin/anarchi-visual-engine.exe', d+'/anarchi-visual-engine.exe'); console.log('Release ' + d + ' finalized.');" && npm run virustotal
scripts.unsigned-release: npm run package && node -e "const fs=require('fs'), crypto=require('crypto'); const id=crypto.randomBytes(8).toString('hex'); const d='./releases/v'+process.env.npm_package_version+'-unsigned-'+id; if(!fs.existsSync(d))fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('./bin/anarchi-visual-engine.exe', d+'/anarchi-visual-engine.exe');" && npm run virustotal
